model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board-raw.png is the separately generated identity authority; the accepted world v6 and accepted portrait v3 are independent image_gen hard-edge chroma regenerations using that board, while each rejected predecessor is reference-only.

negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must be a complete back view with no visible face
northwest and northeast must remain visually distinct back diagonals
no labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark or scenery
no cropped world subject or cell-edge crossing
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying
observedBackgroundFact: All opaque generated sheets contain a spatially varying near-magenta backdrop rather than guaranteed exact #FF00FF; formal removal is pending rebuild under the latest frozen residual-key-aware contract with component review and mask-bounded repair.
